title: São Paulo, SP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

São Paulo is a city in SP with a population of 12,396,372. Latin America’s largest city and financial powerhouse, a cultural melting pot with world-class dining, arts, and a non-stop urban energy.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
